posts.author: joiski (Johannes Engøy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!
I’m running a single creative project. My team and I are working on a comic book. We’d like to have a list of processes (items) that we could divide amongst each other and register the status of, particularly as they relate to the deadline. But we find it to be rather lengthy and complicated making an entire group per comics page and pasting all of the processes onto each group. We would rather have the processes lined up vertically and then just have "page 1, page 2, page 3 etc. " horizontally. Is this possible in Monday? Thank you
Kind regards,
Johannes

Here is a visual representation to showcase what we’re thinking of. (Extra kudos if there could be a progress bar visually present on the main table!)
